name: Pumpkin Pecan Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except nuts and powdered sugar in a large bowl. Mix well.
2. Beat the mixture for an additional 5 minutes until smooth.
3. Fold in the chopped pecans.
4. Grease and flour a Bundt pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared Bundt pan.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before removing from the pan and transferring to a wire rack.
8. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
